channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Celebrations Across the U.S. for USMNT Victory
item.description: Americans at watch parties nationwide celebrated the U.S. men's national team's win over Bosnia-Herzegovina, advancing them to the round of 16.

item.title: Parents accused in death of severely obese son to face competency tests
item.description: Seven-year-old Casper O'Brien weighed 255 pounds at death, which was attributed to dilated cardiomyopathy and other factors.

item.title: Olympian David Hearn indicted for alleged Reflecting Pool vandalism
item.description: Olympian David Hearn has been indicted for allegedly damaging the lining of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Trump's crypto earnings and potential conflict of interest concerns
item.description: New disclosures show President Trump earned $1.4 billion from crypto in 2025. Reuters reporter Tom Bergin discusses the implications.
